title: Keep search results in the UI while browsing through the items found
excerpt: This has to be improved, I search for something in the ‘Everything’ search, sometimes I’d find multiple results and I’m not sure which is the item I’m looking for, as soon as I open an item, it would close the search res…

posts.author: Shiranos (Shiran Tal)
posts.cookedHtml:
This has to be improved, I search for something in the ‘Everything’ search, sometimes I’d find multiple results and I’m not sure which is the item I’m looking for, as soon as I open an item, it would close the search results, and if the item I opened is not the one, I would have to go back again and perform the search.

Exiting the item (which was opened from the search results) should result in me getting back to the search results which needs to be there in the back.

Mind you that searching in ‘Everything’ is not very fast, sometimes very slow. It makes the searching task to be exhausting and a waste of time.
